title: Department Manager Vacancy at Metro Cash & Carry - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Metro Cash & Carry - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, Metro Cash & Carry in Chandigarh is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Metro Cash & Carry:
Metro Cash & Carry is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Metro Cash & Carry!
